title: The Gorton and Denton By-Election Comes at a Bad Time for Keir Starmer
author: Michael D. Shear and Stephen Castle
fullText: A parliamentary by-election in Gorton and Denton, outside Manchester, will test support for Britain’s prime minister at a moment of intense political pressure.
summary: A parliamentary by-election in Gorton and Denton, outside Manchester, will test support for Britain’s prime minister at a moment of intense political pressure.
